underlying_goal: Systematically audit and refactor the Laravel app directory to improve code quality, remove dead code, fix architectural issues, and align with Laravel best practices.
friction_detail: Assistant initially proposed analysis approach when user wanted direct action; assistant started modifying email logic before confirming online/offline email requirements.
brief_summary: User wanted a comprehensive PHP/app audit resulting in multiple refactors: dead code removal, middleware reorganization, action/controller separation, env config extraction, enum cleanup, model improvements, and error handler customization, with most changes completed and tested successfully.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Do not include private methods in controllers
Always confirm before making changes that might affect business logic
Execute composer test after code changes to verify nothing breaks
Store discoveries in a structured plan/backlog for incremental execution
Explain what you're going to do before doing it
